faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Garden City South?
faqs.answer: Garden City South homeowners typically encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly problematic in older homes with wood structures, while pavement ants often nest in cracks along driveways and sidewalks. Our technicians identify the specific species and target treatment accordingly.
